findings.title: Architecture verifier path passes independently
findings.mechanism: Verifier script has freshness gates, checks loop integrity, docs-verifier, market-intelligence consumption, and health-monitor state. Independent signoff artifact is current (<2 min old).
findings.root_cause: Architecture verifier is functioning correctly; remaining blocker is correctly classified as external.
findings.recommended_fix: Continue rerunning independent verification on each watchdog refresh.

findings.title: Docs quality verifier is stable and passing
findings.mechanism: Docs verifier shows independently verified pass with 87 consecutive passes since last failure. Editorial and agentic checks are coherent.
findings.root_cause: Docs quality loop is healthy and self-sustaining.
findings.recommended_fix: No action needed; docs verifier is stable.

findings.title: Loop 'pypi-auto-unblocker' has NO self-improvement mandate
findings.mechanism: Self-repair/self-improve audit identifies pypi-auto-unblocker as the sole loop without a self-improvement mandate. Flat outcomes will cause repetitive tactics without redesign.
findings.root_cause: Loop was created without a self-improvement mandate.
findings.recommended_fix: Add self_improvement_mandate to the loop: detect flat outcomes, trigger redesign, register in self_improvement_loops.json, require independent signoff.

findings.title: Shared market-intelligence consumption is machine-verifiable
findings.mechanism: All code-backed consumers (run.py, reddit_monitor.py, distribution_lane_executor.py) are loaded. Distribution lane executor consumed fresh competitor analysis today.
findings.root_cause: Market intelligence pipeline is functioning; consumers are verifiable.

ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Clears the external adoption blocker or preserves truthful fail-closed outcome ownership.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Add self-improvement mandate to pypi-auto-unblocker loop
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Prevent indefinite flat-outcome loops without redesign.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Loop gains ability to self-diagnose flat outcomes and trigger redesign.
